# Usama Munawar — Backend Systems Engineer

> Senior Backend Systems Engineer specializing in Laravel, automation (n8n), VoIP/Asterisk platforms, and AI integrations. 5+ years of production experience, 180+ projects shipped, $145K+ delivered across Upwork, Toptal, and Fiverr.

## Who

- **Name:** Usama Munawar
- **Role:** Backend Systems Engineer · Laravel & AI Engineer
- **Location:** Lahore, Pakistan (works worldwide, remote)
- **Email:** devusamaworks@gmail.com
- **WhatsApp:** +92 303 8004684
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/CH-USAMA
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/usama-works/
- **Upwork:** https://www.upwork.com/freelancers/~01007bf0a0286da654
- **Fiverr:** https://www.fiverr.com/ch_usama_

## What I do (services)

- Production-grade Laravel apps (queue workers, event-driven, DDD)
- Multi-tenant SaaS with billing, RBAC, audit trails, zero-downtime deploys
- REST & GraphQL APIs (OAuth2, rate limiting, OpenAPI specs)
- n8n automation, MCP agents, orchestration pipelines
- VoIP & call centers on Asterisk / FreePBX (IVR, predictive dialers, SIP)
- Real-time systems (Laravel Reverb, WebSockets, Pusher, Socket.IO)
- AI integrations: RAG pipelines (Pinecone, pgvector), LangChain, Claude, GPT-4

## Featured Projects

- [MOE Limo Operations Platform](https://dev-usama-portfolio.vercel.app/project/4): Omnichannel ticketing and dispatch for the limo industry. Laravel + Livewire + MySQL + real-time.
- [iSmart Clinic Healthcare SaaS](https://dev-usama-portfolio.vercel.app/project/8): Multi-tenant AI-powered clinic platform with WhatsApp appointment automation.
- [Jabulani Hardware Store](https://dev-usama-portfolio.vercel.app/project/9): South African e-commerce with Stripe and Google Auth.
- [Jabulani Quarries Site](https://dev-usama-portfolio.vercel.app/project/11): Corporate site for a quarry and crushing operation.

- **Stack:** Laravel, PHP 8+, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, Node.js, TypeScript, React, AWS, Docker
- **AI Stack:** Claude, GPT-4, LangChain, Pinecone, pgvector, n8n, MCP, custom evaluation harnesses
